name: sanofi directive — _document_metadata
what_it_solves: Directive field '_document_metadata' with its full sub-payload.
why_it_exists: Depth pass: each field carries its own scope (positioning, deliverables, timelines, negotiation stance) — surfacing them separately makes each addressable.

raw.title: CrisPRO × Sanofi — Pitch Deck Directive

corrections.fix: CEACAM5×CD3 T-cell engager → CEACAM5-Topo1 ADC (SGN-CEACAM5C). Gate logic unchanged.

SAR445953.mechanism: Humanized IgG1 anti-CEACAM5 mAb conjugated to topoisomerase 1 inhibitor AMDCPT (8 molecules per antibody)

raw.purpose: Slide-by-slide production brief for the deck-building agent. Every slide specifies: title, subtitle, act, type, visual layout, one_claim, speaker_note, data_anchors, hard_stops, and transition. The agent makes zero content decisions — all choices are pre-made here.
raw.audience: Sanofi Head of Translational Medicine + VP Business Development

structure.ACT_1_SCIENCE: Slides 02–08 (7 slides) — establish the problem and the four signals
structure.ACT_2_DEAL: Slides 09–12 (4 slides) — deliverables, validation, deal, asks

raw.narrative_spine: LIVER-SPLIT → TMB-DECODE → GATE-FAIL → CEA-GATE → Two-Gate System → Deal
raw.framing: CrisPRO-led — platform capabilities demonstrated through Sanofi's own asset failures
raw.act_divider_instruction: Insert a full-bleed yellow banner slide between Slide 08 and Slide 09 labeled 'ACT 2 — THE DEAL' if the deck agent supports divider slides. If not, embed the act label in Slide 09's top banner.
raw.stress_test_status: All data anchors verified against transcript tool outputs. See STRESS_TEST_AUDIT.json.
global_hard_stops: CARMEN-LC03 ≥80% OS HR=0.71 is POST-HOC TREND — CI not published, underpowered
All cCEA ORR data are from NSCLC (PMC12720031) — NSCLC caveat mandatory on Slide 06
CEACAM5_80_FRAC=0.28 is CONSERVATIVE FLOOR from NSCLC data — label as OA-08
Do not disclose MAS formula, proprietary formula mechanics, or internal registry codes
NPV values ($12.4M/$6.7M/$18.8M) are INTERNAL MODEL — label as open assumption if shown
Use 90% CI 0.18–0.63 for pTMB HR — NOT the old 95% CI (old error, corrected)
Do not quote '$50–150M milestone payments' — removed in 8D audit (audit note S09)
SAR445953 = CEACAM5-Topo1 ADC (SGN-CEACAM5C) — NOT T-cell engager / CEACAM5×CD3

open_assumptions_on_deck.label_required: Modeled — not directly observed in MSS CRC
